calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Philip T. Kilduff, Esq.,T:415.673.0368, appearing specially for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF TD AUTO FINANCE LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED. No opposition filed. TD Auto Finance is entitled to a judgment in its favor of $42,971.54 against defendant Helen Liang.

ORDER and JUDGMENT were signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

Motion For Order To Have Admissions Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., Tel. No. 415.673.0368, specially appearing for Plaintiff Auto Finance LLC;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

Ruling - Plaintiff TD Auto Finance Llc's Motion For Order To Have Admissions Deemed Admitted.

There being no other appearance, the Court adopted the tentative ruling: . Plaintiffs' motion is unopposed and granted. The admissions sought in plaintiff's Request for Admissions, Set One, are deemed admitted. A copy of this Order shall be served on defendant with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $510.00 are awarded to plaintiff to be paid within twenty days of the date of service of this Order. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: J. Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (D302/JPT/RBU)
